mapper.insert: insert into agent_dataset(owner_user_id, conversation_id, run_id, source_tool_call_id, dataset_name, storage_type, schema_json, data_json, row_count, expire_time, create_by, create_time) values(#{ownerUserId}, #{conversationId}, #{runId}, #{sourceToolCallId}, #{datasetName}, #{storageType}, #{schemaJson}, #{dataJson}, #{rowCount}, #{expireTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select * from agent_dataset where id=#{id} and owner_user_id=#{ownerUserId} and (expire_time is null or expire_time > sysdate())
select * from agent_dataset where conversation_id=#{conversationId} and (expire_time is null or expire_time > sysdate()) order by id desc
mapper.delete: delete from agent_dataset where expire_time is not null and expire_time <= sysdate()
